allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card input label badge separator sheet accordion tabs table dialog select textarea dropdown-menu avatar progress toast sonner checkbox switch -y)
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const r = z.string\(\).safeParse\(1\); if\(!r.success\) console.log\(Object.keys\(r.error\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const r = z.object\({email: z.string\(\).email\(\)}\).safeParse\({email: 'bad'}\); if\(!r.success\) { console.log\('issues:', r.error.issues\); console.log\('has issues:', 'issues' in r.error\); }")
